text: With a partner, ask and answer the following questions.
What activities do different members of your family enjoy doing?

explanation: فعل mend به معنای تعمیر کردن وسایل شکسته یا قدیمی است و در سطح آیلتس برای توصیف مهارت‌های فنی یا سرگرمی‌ها کاربرد دارد.

text: old cars. My mother enjoys running and reading books
What do your mother and father want you to do in the future?
What type of films do different members of your family watch?
What do different members of your family talk to you about?
